criteria.reason: Completed manual review results include copy/open structured UI actions and tests verify them.
Insufficient balance still blocks and exposes billing action.
Operator web result panel shows status, credit, publication and action controls.
Reviews UI labels LocalOS drafts as manual-publication-only and copy feedback is present.
Docs describe Sprint 20 as UX/safety work only.

commands_run: python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_operator_manual_review.py tests/test_operator_paid_preflight.py tests/test_operator_credit_reservation.py tests/test_operator_audit.py
